competitions.product: Welcome to
competitions.product_info: Welcome to The Time Vault Club Where passion for horology meets opportunity. We exist to bring the world of exceptional watchmaking closer to you, from iconic Swiss craftsmanship to bespoke British design. Through our curated competitions, we give you the chance to discover and own watches most people only dream of. LIVE COMPETITION All of our prize draws are hosted live, so you can witness every moment as dream watches find new owners. With regular competitions featuring everything from iconic Swiss classics to standout modern releases, the next opportunity is always closer than you think. competitions.product: WIN A VINTAGE CARTIER PARIS SANTOS DUMONT 96054 WITH ORIGINAL BOX
competitions.product_info: Home – Cartier Paris Santos Dumont “Extra Plate” 96054 WIN A VINTAGE CARTIER PARIS SANTOS DUMONT 96054 WITH ORIGINAL BOX Value: £9,500 Duration: 7 Days Age: Circa 1980s Max. Entries: 949 Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 12/05/26 The Cartier Santos Dumont is one of the finest wristwatches from the maison’s distinguished lineage, and an incredibly elegant piece for both men and women . Crafted in 18k solid gold, this reference 96054 dates to the 1980s and features the highly desirable Paris-signed dial. It is known as the “ Extra Plate ” or “ Ultra Thin “, thanks to its F. Piguet calibre 21 mechanical movement. This example is in superb condition , with pristine dial , excellent case , and accompanied by its original box. 6.64% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 63 949 6.64% 886 Tickets remaining 886/949 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 6 Days 19 Hours 23 Minutes 57 Seconds ENTER NOW WIN A VINTAGE CARTIER PARIS SANTOS DUMONT 18K GOLD ENTER NOW 6.64% SOLD 0 Tickets Sold: 63 949 6.64% 886 Tickets remaining 886/949 Tickets Remaining Time Left to End: 6 Days 19 Hours 23 Minutes 57 Seconds Value: £9,500 Duration: 7 days Age: Circa 1980s Entries: 949 Max. Ticket Price: £20 Live Draw: 12/05/2026 The Cartier Santos Dumont is one of the finest wristwatches from the maison’s distinguished lineage, and an incredibly elegant piece for both men and women . Crafted in 18k solid gold, this reference 96054 dates to the 1980s and features the highly desirable Paris-signed dial. It is known as the “ Extra Plate ” or “ Ultra Thin “, thanks to its F. Piguet calibre 21 mechanical movement. This example is in superb condition , with pristine dial , excellent case , and accompanied by its original box. #24 - The Cartier Paris Santos Dumont "Extra Plate" 96054 The History— The Example The Cartier Santos-Dumont traces its origins back to 1904, when Louis Cartier created one of the very first wristwatches for the Brazilian aviator Alberto Santos-Dumont, allowing him to check the time mid-flight without removing his hands from the controls. It marked a pivotal moment in watchmaking – helping transition timekeeping from pocket to wrist. This reference 96054 , dating to the 1980s , carries that legacy forward in a beautifully refined form. Crafted in 18k solid gold , it features the highly desirable Paris-signed dial , a detail that signals quality and collectability to those who know. Known as the “Extra Plate” or “Ultra Thin” , it is powered by the ultra-slim F. Piguet calibre 21 mechanical movement, giving the watch its elegant, low-profile presence on the wrist. This example is presented in superb condition , with a pristine dial and excellent case , retaining the sharpness that defines these pieces. Accompanied by its original box , this is a sophisticated and historically significant Santos-Dumont – elegant, understated and highly collectible. ENTER NOW The First Competition of its Kind The Vintage Watch Draw is unique. We’re the first competition website dedicated to collector-grade vintage watches, backed by a trusted expert. After the initial idea over five years ago, we’re so excited to now bring this new concept to you. Curated by A Trusted Expert Our competitions are curated by Alex Stevens, a trusted & reputable vintage watch specialist with lifelong experience in the trade. 12 Month Service Warranty Every watch is fully serviced by our watchmaker & comes with a 12 month mechanical warranty, so you can enjoy your watch hassle-free. Collector-Grade Condition Every watch is meticulously curated by Alex, known for selecting only the finest, collector-grade examples in terms of condition & originality. Low & Transparent Odds We don’t flood the draw with tickets. Our competitions are deliberately limited to keep odds low & your chance of winning fair. Authenticity Guarantee Every watch is thoroughly inspected & fully authenticated by our in-house expert. We are professionals, not enthusiasts or hobbyists. Guaranteed Draws Every draw ends on the stated date, no matter what. We never extend our competitions, even if we haven't sold all the tickets.
